hero.title:

with AI Vision
hero.description: Aether Labs is a modified version of Respondus Lockdown Browser originally designed for computerized testing, enhanced with integrated visual AI capabilities for intelligent screen analysis.

reviews.label: Trusted Reviews
reviews.title: Trusted By Real Students
reviews.description: See why thousands of students rely on Aether Labs to stay secure, fast, and stress-free during exams.

cards.name: w_rz01
cards.text: Used this extension to get a 100 on all my CH302 exams. Professor complained about students cheating (switching tabs) but I had nothing to worry about.

cards.name: cryned
cards.text: Got perfect scores on every test after I started using this. Barely opened my notes the whole semester.

cards.name: StarSafety
cards.text: Used it during an online exam and nothing got flagged. Kinda wild how smooth it is.

about.title: About Aether Labs
about.description: Aether Labs combines the security of Respondus Lockdown Browser with advanced visual AI capabilities. Originally built for computerized exams, it now includes screen capture and analysis using GPT-4V and Claude APIs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to common Aether Labs questions. If your question is not listed, contact us.
questions: What is Aether Labs and how does it work?
How do I install the app on Windows or macOS?
Do I need an account to use Aether Labs?
Is the app safe for exam environments?
How can I get support or ask a question?
answers: Aether Labs is an AI application designed to assist you in preparing and taking exams within secure environments like Respondus LockDown Browser. It works as an integrated assistant that generates summaries, study strategies, and provides support during closed sessions, without interfering with exam security.

Download the installer from our website, run the file according to your operating system, and follow the installation steps. The app will automatically configure itself to be compatible with LockDown Browser and other protected exam browsers.
Yes, you need to create an account with your email to activate all features. This allows synchronizing your settings, session history, and accessing the personalized AI assistant.
Yes. Aether Labs is optimized to work in isolated mode within closed sessions, respecting LockDown Browser restrictions. Your activity and data are protected with end-to-end encryption.
Contact us through our support form in the app or send a message on WhatsApp to +81 2232 6336. Our team responds in less than 24 hours.
